code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut in_num = false
mut neg = false
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        cur = 0
        neg = false
      end
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
      neg = true
    else
      if in_num
        let v = if neg
          0 - cur
        else
          cur
        end
        if not list.contains(nums, v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        end
        in_num = false
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  let v = if neg
    0 - cur
  else
    cur
  end
  if not list.contains(nums, v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  end
end

let total = list.len(nums)
mut used: List<Int> = []
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut k = 0
while k < total
  mut best_idx = -1
  mut best_val = 0
  mut j = 0
  while j < total
    if not list.contains(used, j)
      match list.get(nums, j)
      when Some(v)
        if best_idx == -1
          best_idx = j
          best_val = v
        else
          if v < best_val
            best_idx = j
            best_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  sorted = list.push(sorted, best_val)
  used = list.push(used, best_idx)
  k = k + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
let sn = list.len(sorted)
while idx < sn
  match list.get(sorted, idx)
  when Some(v)
    if idx == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
